preToolUse.bash: root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-$COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}}"; if [ -z "$root" ] || [ ! -f "$root/scripts/sdd-hook-guard.sh" ]; then printf '%s' '{"permissionDecision":"allow"}'; exit 0; fi; sh "$root/scripts/sdd-hook-guard.sh" --emit copilot
preToolUse.powershell: $root = $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if (-not $root) { $root = $env:PLUGIN_ROOT }; if (-not $root) { $root = $env:COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT }; $guard = if ($root) { Join-Path $root 'scripts/sdd-hook-guard.ps1' } else { $null }; if (-not $guard -or -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $guard)) { [Console]::Out.Write('{"permissionDecision":"allow"}'); exit 0 }; & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $guard -Emit copilot
